description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair looks great when paired with ethnic wear. This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease. Heel: 2" Upper Synthetic leather footbed with a printed panel from the back forefoot to the heel, and has a synthetic leather padding in a shiny shade for absolute comfort and style Leather straps on the forefoot with one printed and padded strap to hold the foot in place in style Outsole Durable TPU non-slip outsole textured in the heel region, has horizontal grooves on the forehoot and horizontal grooves on the heel base for ultimate grip even on smooth surfaces Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
